completed_tasks.name: Load prior context (PROJECT.md, REQUIREMENTS.md, STATE.md, phase 01 + 05 CONTEXTs, codebase maps)
Scout codebase — SSE endpoint at stream.py, PriceUpdate.to_dict() shape, no frontend/ dir
Analyze phase, identify gray areas, auto-select all + recommended options

decisions.decision: Next.js 15 App Router + TypeScript + Tailwind via create-next-app (D-01)
decisions.rationale: One-command scaffold; matches PLAN.md §11 Node 20 Docker stage; current defaults
Aligns with Phase 9 Dockerfile expectations; fails fast on old Node
Required for static export; smooth FastAPI StaticFiles interop in Phase 8
Same-origin in all envs; PLAN.md §3 forbids CORS; EventSource stays relative URL

decisions.decision: Tailwind theme tokens + CSS variables together; permanent dark class (D-09, D-10)
decisions.rationale: One palette for utilities + runtime-styled components (flash anim, heatmap); no light mode scope

decisions.decision: Root-level PriceStreamProvider owns single EventSource lifecycle (D-11, D-15)
decisions.rationale: One connection per app lifetime; testable; no SSR/StrictMode double-connect
Selector-based re-renders critical at 500ms * N tickers; Context+useReducer would flood

decisions.decision: session_start_price computed frontend-side, first-seen per ticker (D-14)
decisions.rationale: Avoids backend change; Phase 6 stays frontend-only; accepted tradeoff: page reload resets baseline

decisions.decision: Connection status in same store: connected|reconnecting|disconnected (D-18)
decisions.rationale: Phase 7 FE-10 header dot reads this verbatim; no second state surface

decisions.decision: Narrow try/catch around JSON.parse + ingest; console.warn + continue (D-19)
decisions.rationale: Matches backend log-and-continue pattern; EventSource stays alive on bad frame
Satisfies SC #3 (real wire) AND SC #4 (pure logic); cheap to keep or delete later

decisions.decision: Only new prod dep: zustand. Dev deps: vitest toolchain. No chart libs (D-24)
decisions.rationale: Chart libs arrive in Phase 7/8 with their requirements; no premature deps

next_action: Run: /clear, then /gsd-plan-phase 06 --auto. Chain flag workflow._auto_chain_active should already be true from this discuss run — plan-phase will auto-advance to execute-phase on completion.
context_notes: Phase 6 discuss-phase complete in --auto mode. 24 decisions captured across 8 categories (scaffolding, dev proxy, theme, SSE client & store, verification, directory layout, dependency budget, Claude's discretion). Canonical refs list is comprehensive: PLAN.md §2/§3/§4/§6/§10/§11, REQUIREMENTS.md FE-01/FE-02, ROADMAP.md phase 6 success criteria, phase 01 + 05 CONTEXTs, 5 codebase maps, plus 6 external docs (Next.js static exports, rewrites, Tailwind v4, Zustand, MDN EventSource, Vitest+Next). Backend is read-only for this phase — backend/app/market/stream.py emits {TICKER: PriceUpdate.to_dict()} per SSE data frame, which frontend parses verbatim. Planner should produce ~3 plans: (1) scaffold + theme + dev proxy, (2) Zustand store + PriceStreamProvider + session_start_price logic, (3) Vitest + MockEventSource test + /debug page. No blockers, no anti-patterns discovered this session.
